query:
SELECT e.id, e.userId, e.courseId, c.title as courseTitle, u.email 
FROM enrollments e 
JOIN courses c ON e.courseId = c.id 
JOIN users u ON e.userId = u.id 
WHERE u.email = 'student@test.com'
command:
